untranslatable_reason: Signal requires specialized microstructure indicators not available in standard OHLCV dataset: (1) 'quantity imbalance' measured in standard deviations requires order book depth data; (2) 'correlated quantity shift detection across related markets' requires multi-asset cross-market order flow analysis; (3) 'price dislocation in bps' requires real-time bid-ask spread tracking; (4) 'consecutive update confirmations' requires tick-by-tick order book reconstruction. These are high-frequency order book microstructure metrics that cannot be approximated from candle-based indicators alone.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally designed for order book microstructure analysis at sub-second to multi-second frequencies. It predicts arbitrage opportunities by analyzing quantity imbalances and their cross-market propagation before prices adjust. The allowed indicator set (OHLCV-based technical indicators) cannot capture the required order book dynamics, quantity asymmetries, or cross-venue correlation patterns. A proper implementation would require: (1) Level 2/3 order book snapshots, (2) trade-by-trade execution data with size characteristics, (3) multi-venue liquidity analysis, and (4) microsecond-precision timestamps.
